text:
club, association of people united by a common interest or goal, also known as club (recreational), association. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "juridical person",
 "nonprofit organization"
- has part(s): "group of humans"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary"
- Commons category: "Clubs"
- different from: "nightclub",
 "club"
- position held by head of the organization: "chairperson"
